task_completion.description: Verify that the correct dataset is loaded in Oracle Analytics Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop interface is visible, and 'sample_order_lines2023' is shown in the data panel on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the canvas is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab or header at the bottom or top of the workspace is named 'Portfolio Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Scatter (Bubble) visualization is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Scatter or Bubble chart is present on the canvas. The title of this specific visualization is exactly 'Product Sub-Category Portfolio Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify the X and Y axes are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The X-Axis label on the chart or in the Grammar panel is 'Sales', and the Y-Axis label is 'Profit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Size and Color mappings are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, 'Quantity Ordered' is placed in the Size section, and 'Product Category' is placed in the Color section. The chart should display bubbles with 3 distinct colors.

task_completion.description: Verify the Detail/Category mapping is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Grammar panel, 'Product Sub Category' is placed in the Detail or Category section. The chart should display multiple distinct bubbles (approximately 17).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface with its standard menus, data panels, and grammar panels, rather than terminal windows or code editors.

integrity.description: Verify the visualization is generated from the actual dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart shows a realistic distribution of bubbles with exactly 3 distinct colors and approximately 17 bubbles, matching the dataset properties, rather than a generic placeholder or manually drawn image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use external plotting scripts (like Python/Matplotlib) to bypass the software requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualization is strictly contained within the Oracle Analytics Desktop UI, not in a standalone image viewer, web browser, or Jupyter notebook.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The workbook should be named 'portfolio_analysis' (or 'portfolio_analysis.dva'). The canvas must be named 'Portfolio Analysis'. The visualization title must be 'Product Sub-Category Portfolio Analysis'. The dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' contains exactly 3 unique 'Product Category' values and 17 unique 'Product Sub Category' values. Therefore, a correct Scatter (Bubble) visualization will display exactly 17 bubbles colored using exactly 3 distinct colors.
